nasb.text: Therefore what benefit were you then deriving from the things of which you are now ashamed? For the outcome of those things is death.

esv.text: But what fruit were you getting at that time from the things of which you are now ashamed? For the end of those things is death.

cnv.text: 那麼，你們在現今以為羞恥的事上，當時得了甚麼呢？那些事的結局就是死。

ccb.text: 做了现在想起来也觉得羞耻的事，得到了什么益处呢？那些事只能导致死亡！

csbs.text: 那么，在你们现在看为羞耻的那些事上，你们当时到底得了什么果子呢？那些事的结局就是死。
